hotel_name: Hilton Garden Inn Rebouças (Hilton Garden Inn Reboucas)

reviews.title: Sao Paulo
reviews.text: A clean, efficient basic services hotel. Go for it!!

reviews.title: Ventilation system
reviews.text: Something wasn't right with the vent system in the room.  Even when it was off it would blow loudly, then go quieter, then louder, all night long.

reviews.title: An average hotel in a good part of a huge city
reviews.text:
I did't love that they gave me "the only room they had" on a fairly low floor even though I'd requested differently when I made the reservation.  Also, for reasons unbeknownst to me, I got a room with two beds I didn't need (traveling solo).
Breakfast is good, and the guy in charge (sorry for not getting his name) is awesome... if only they didn't rush to pick up your plate (with food on it) every time you get up to grab a beverage!
Checkout was speedy and efficient.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nice and new amenities
reviews.negatives: Awful service

reviews.title: It was a clean and good hotel.
reviews.text: The staff were very kind and attentive. English is spoken, so I was able to enjoy my stay comfortably. They also stored my luggage after check-out, which allowed me to explore the city of São Paulo until my departure time, which was a great help. I think it’s a very convenient hotel with good access to the nearest subway station, just about a 5-minute walk away.

reviews.title: Too expensive for the overall accommodation experience delivery

reviews.negatives: Too expensive for the overall accommodation experience delivery

reviews.title: It is clean and has good amenities.

reviews.title: I was charged more days and I still dint see the correction on my bank account
reviews.positives: I would have love to have bacon on week days. The staff should talk in other languages, and offer room service like water or ice
reviews.negatives: I stay for one day and the came back a few days, they still charge me more days and I still havent been able to see the reveral on my bank account.

reviews.positives: Very frugal room. Hotel is well located.
reviews.negatives: Value for money is not great. Room has a poor decor. Breakfast is poor.

reviews.title: Great porperty and location!
reviews.text: Great property and location.  Just wished they had a pool. Otherwise everything was clean, comfortable and well located in Pinheiros area.  Tons of cute restaurants around the city.

reviews.title: Good option for a mid-range hotel with room for improvements
reviews.positives: Very friendly and accommodating staff. Good location/neighborhood. Other than comforter issue (see below), room and bathroom were clean. And despite there being construction nearby, did not hear much/any noise.
reviews.negatives: One bed had a comforter that had splotches, unclear if it was not cleaned or something that they couldn't remove even with cleaning. Upon arrival, only one water bottle in room despite being two guests, was told additional will cost a fee, c'mon! Breakfast was also underwhelming.

reviews.title: Convenience and coziness.
reviews.text:
Very friendly staff  
Delicious breakfast  
Clean

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Great rooms, location, and value.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Although pets were allowed, the hotel requests they are always in your arms while going through the public spaces and they cannot be alone inside the room. Not great policy. No places to bring them for a pee outside the hotel also, no grass around it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I like it

reviews.title: Great location, average value
reviews.positives: King size bed, size of room, shower, breakfast choices,  location, and very friendly staff, including in the restaurant.
reviews.negatives: A towel for the floor in front of the shower was not provided. We asked for one to be sent up, and it never came. I received conflicting information in messages with the hotel before we arrived and needed a third message to clarify. The scrambled eggs and bacon were extremely undercooked, so much so I didn't eat either.

reviews.title: Highly recommend!!!!
reviews.text: Very nice new hotel and great location. Would definitely stay there again.

reviews.title: Pleasantly surprised
reviews.positives:
I wasn't expecting much, but this place is just fine.  The room i had was spacious, clean, bright, with large windows revealing a 180 degree view of the city. And, the fact that the windows could be opened, so i didn't need to keep the AC on, was a huge bonus. The desk space was a good size to work. 
- The bathroom was a good size and the lighting pretty good. No amenity kit to speak of, but there was a shower cap and tissues. The body lotion was actually hydrating.
- Breakfast was included, but i didn't take it. 
- There's a grocery store a few blocks away, west on Pinheiros, (A small bottle of water in the hotel lobby is 8 Reais/$1.60US, so better off going to the store.)
There are also restaurants, bars, (some notable places), coffee shops close by and towards Fradique Coutinho subway. Just get off Rebouças, and go north of the hotel. 
The neighbourhood is not that pretty, but seemed safe. Overall good choice if you want to stay in this area. 
I'd like to give a 7.5 rating, but booking only allows whole numbers.
P.S. Ubers are very inexpensive, but they do take a while to show up and traffic can be heavy, so plan accordingly.
reviews.negatives:
- The Wi-Fi was very annoying. It times out, so you have to keep logging on  several times a day which is VERY inconvenient. 
- Bed was not comfortable - very hard.
- Some of the staff are not well informed. One of them gave me completely incorrect information about certain costs. If i had listened to them, i would have ended up owing a lot of money. Another one told me the mall was three blocks away, but it was actually a 20 minute cab ride. They were nice though.
- They do not provide washcloths, so BYO.

reviews.title: Great Value in Sao Paolo
reviews.text: New and very clean Hilton in Sao Paolo at a fraction of other hotels. Will definitely visit again and highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice well located
reviews.text: Graaf staff nice facilities good location many restaurants just around the corner

reviews.title: Estadía confortable
reviews.text:
Nos quedamos apenas dos días y medio en el hotel aprovechando una escala que teníamos en SAo Paulo, la ubicación del hotel me pareció bien, tiene cerca restaurantes y lugares para comer. Tuve una experiencia muy buena al hacer el check in a la madrugada ya que mi vuelo se demoró. Nuestra habitación era amplia y tenía todo lo necesario para una estadía confortable. 
El desayuno cuenta con buffet y algunas opciones para pedir como omelette, el café es de cápsula, máquina Nescafé. El personal fue muy amable ! También use el gimnasio, que si bien no es grande, pero tiene algunos aparatos para mantenerse activo.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: No water in room and breakfast was weak bread not fresh,coffee weak.hiltons run nicer in Usa.

reviews.title: Gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.text:
Gutes Hotel in exzellenter Lage in pinheiros.
Fußläufig zur Metro (Fradique Coutinho - Gelbe Linie) wie auch zu zahlreichen Restaurants, Bars, Cafés und Supermärkten.
Gegend auch abends für São Paulo-Verhältnisse sicher. Hotelpersonal nett und zuvorkommend.

Einzig das Fitnessstudio ist etwas dürftig eingerichtet und sehr klein.

reviews.title: Would be back

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel in solider Lage.
reviews.text:
Man sollte kein "Hilton" erwarten aber das Hotel ist wirklich gut. Gute Frühstücksauswahl und Lage für den Ort.

Mankos: Schwache WC Spülung, Personal war nicht das Serviveorientierteste.
Seifenspender waren teilweise leer und hier und da lag ein Haar vom vorherigen Gast noch rum. Aber ich würde es wieder nehmen.

reviews.title: Convenient location for a modern stay in Pinheiros district of São Paulo - Recommended!
reviews.positives:
The location in Pinheiros was super convenient to great bars and restaurants. It was also very close to a metro station!

The room was modern and clean. The bathroom was particularly nice! 

The gym was very well-equipped and clean.

Breakfast had a lot of variety. 

The staff were very helpful. They were patient with my Portuguese and able to help in English, too.

The welcome drink was a fun addition!
reviews.negatives:
Maybe I missed it, but there wasn’t a hairdryer in my room.

My key card frequently stopped working after being in my purse for a few hours. It was inconvenient to return to the desk to fix it, but the staff were very nice.

reviews.title: Loved the quiet but charming neighborhood. Very friendly and helpfull staff. Nice clean rooms with a great view! Highly
reviews.positives: Spacious and clean rooms with an attentive and friendly staff. Great breakfast. Great locations that is quiet, but within walking distance of great bars, cafe, small shops, and restaurants. Perfect area for a chill night out with upscale choices and local businesses. Less than 20 min drive to all other fun neighborhoods and tourist attractions. 5 min walk to the train/subway station.

reviews.positives: Great location close to the center of SP, easy access to the metro. Staff can speak some english should you need it. Safe and secure site. Cozy and well kept rooms. Worth the price if you need a reliable and stress free experience.

reviews.title: Excelente

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The room was large and had everything that a business traveler may need, the cleanliness was very well maintained. I especially loved the view, as I could see the city and the planes descending to and ascending from the city airport. The wifi quality was great and I was able to video call for work without any interruption. The breakfast was good, I only wish that a selection of veggies was a bit larger. The location is great, this is a very nice and safe neighborhood of Sao Paulo. Beco do Batman with murals, bars and cafes is at walking distance, the area is full of good food and shopping.

reviews.title: Hotel bien conectado en zona segura
reviews.positives: Hotel en una zona segura próxima a buenos restaurantes y algunas tiendas interesantes. Bien conectado por coche y metro. Desayuno correcto.
reviews.negatives: Se nota que es un Hilton de gama media. El personal no es muy amable. La habitación requiere algunas reparaciones por ejemplo la silla estaba con la tapicería desgarrada.

reviews.title: Deja mucho que desear para el precio que tiene

reviews.title: Hotel muy bueno, pero hubo problemas con la calidad de conexión a internet.
reviews.positives: La ubicación y calidad de la habitación
reviews.negatives: Internet no funcionaba y para hacerla funcionar demoraron mucho tiempo. Es algo que hoy en día no puede suceder, para trabajar tener internet es casi tan importante como tener agua para vivir.

reviews.title: Esperaba más por el precio y por ser Hilton...
reviews.positives: El cuarto es amplio y la vista (Jardins) es bella, aunque no es la que muestra la foto. El baño es confortable. La ubicación es adecuada, aunque hay que ir de coche a todos lados, salvo a restaurantes que hay al lado y otros cerca. Los ascensores funcionan muy bien.
reviews.negatives: El cuarto tiene solo una silla. Pedimos comida del restaurante y era INCOMIBLE! -un pollo de consistencia intragable. El lugar del desayuno da a un patio interno. El hotel está sobre una avenida muy transitada, puede haber ruido y luz excesiva a la noche.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ubicación excelente
reviews.negatives: El Lobby NO TIENE CATEGORÍA. NO SE CORRESPONDE A UN HOTEL DE CADENA HILTON

reviews.title: Hay varias áreas de mejora, resolver wifi indispensable
reviews.positives: El lugar es en general agradable, cómodo. Buena atención del personal en recepción y restaurante.
reviews.negatives:
La conexión a internet pésima. La red me desconectaba cada pocos minutos había que reloggearse continuamente. Lo que en viaje de trabajo en la actualidad resulta pésimo. No me era posible saber si me estaban mandando mensajes de trabajo porque mi teléfono quedaba pocos minutos conectado. Trabajar en línea difícil porque la conexión estaba muy lenta, una colega que se quedó en otro cuarto tuvo que tomar una llamada en recepción porque la conexión en cuarto no daba para eso. 
El desayuno está bastante bien pero nos quedamos unas 5 noches y terminamos hartas de que la única opción en que se podía comer huevo era revueltos. 
La limpieza del cuarto está más o menos, yo suelo caminar descalza y por caminar poco tiempo en el cuarto los pies me quedaban sucios cada vez. Había una etiqueta de algo que te dejó un cliente pasado pegada en el suelo junto a las cortinas y permaneció ahí toda mi estancia. No dudo que siga ahí para el siguiente huésped. Miserables con las botellas de agua. Hay un letrero que dice que se tiene derecho a solamente 3 botellas por estancia (pienso que debería ser como mínimo 1 por día). En todo el tiempo que estuve ahí solo recibí una botella.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Buena localiZacion

reviews.title: Buen precio valor .. locacion maravillosa
reviews.positives: La localización excelente!!
reviews.negatives: Puede mejorar en la limpieza el día dos solo acomodaron la cama , sacaron la basura. El día tres no colocaron cafe.

reviews.title: Lugar muy práctico para quedarse cerca de restaurantes y tiendas.
reviews.positives: Me gustó que la habitación estaba cómoda y el personal era amable.
reviews.negatives: Que el desayuno podría haber estado más variado.

reviews.title: excelente

reviews.title: Excelente alternativa para viaje de negocios
reviews.positives: Excelente ubicación, habitaciones muy confortables.
reviews.negatives: La atención del personal en general, aunque son amables, podrían ser más cordiales.

reviews.title: Muy buen hotel!
reviews.positives: El hotel es bueno, esta bien ubicado cerca a la Avenida Paulista la principal en Sao Paulo, lo cual hace que los transportes sean cercanos. El desayuno es bueno y muy completo, la limpieza y el cuarto amplios y muy cómodos. El personal también muy atento en todo.
reviews.negatives: El bar cierra muy temprano, no tiene piscina o un lugar común en dónde poder reunirse con los que está viajando en las noches o a cualquier hora del día.

reviews.title: Hotel Moderno y bien ubicado
reviews.positives: Está muy bien ubicado con varios restaurantes alrededor. La zona es linda y segura. El hotel es moderno y el desayuno variado
reviews.negatives: El proceso de Check jn demorado. Llegamos en la madrugada y el proceso duró más de 30 min y solo éramos nosotros en la fila.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ubicacion
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.positives: La cama, el tipo de iluminación indirecta y el baño
reviews.negatives:
Proceso de recepción viendo el pasaporte que era 110 no hubo donde indicaran si necesitaba al convertidor  me percate al estar en la habitación y luego volver a bajar, el precio debería de tener impecable todo el mobiliario la silla del lado de la ventana rota, en la ducha no había shampo, la ducha de vidrio tenía manchas de calcio. Por último no había ni siquiera una botella de agua, todo es vendido y creo que eso sería lo básico, por ese precio considero que podría elegirse otra opción mejor ubicada, o por lo menos que esos detalles no importe pero el agua pura si mal mal.
La luz blanca de da la tv molesta debían de taparla o cambiarla

reviews.title: Buena

reviews.title: Excelente, personal, habitaciones y servicios muy buenos.
reviews.positives: El personal muy amable, tiene mucha seguridad el hotel. El desayuno riquísimo, las habitaciones cómodas, sin duda volvería.
reviews.negatives: Solo le faltaba una piscina 😔 pero el resto es muy bueno, recomendado.

reviews.negatives: El trato recibido

reviews.title: Repetiría mi estancia y la recomendaría.
reviews.positives: Me gustó la atención rápida del personal y su amabilidad, incluso de quienes realizan la limpieza de las habitaciones. También me gustó la limpieza y el cuidado en los detalles.
reviews.negatives: La conexión a internet no fue buena.

reviews.title: Excelente opción en San Pablo
reviews.positives: Muy confortable y bien ubicado
reviews.negatives: El desayuno podría ser mejor
